summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Orbit360 Engine iteration 6 new features: Calendar scheduling CRUD, Push notifications (VAPID key), Trend Finder agent, new dashboard quick action buttons, and UI design refresh with glow effects. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/calendar/schedule creates a scheduled post with id, title, date, status=pending
GET /api/calendar/schedule returns scheduled posts list
GET /api/calendar/schedule?month=2026-04 filters by month correctly
PUT /api/calendar/schedule/{id}/done marks post as done (verified with GET)
DELETE /api/calendar/schedule/{id} deletes scheduled post (verified with GET)
DELETE /api/calendar/schedule/{id} returns 404 for non-existent post
GET /api/push/vapid-key returns non-empty publicKey
GET /api/agents/trends returns list with searches and total
DELETE /api/agents/trends/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
Regression: GET /api/folders returns 4 folders (torah, business, mental_snacks, general)
Regression: GET /api/content/items works
Regression: GET /api/settings/ai returns provider
Regression: GET /api/backup/export works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with new quick action buttons (trends, calendar, affiliates)
Frontend: Calendar page loads at /calendar with Hebrew dates and enable push button
Frontend: Calendar shows scheduled posts as colored dots on days (pink=pending, green=done)
Frontend: Clicking a day on calendar opens schedule modal with title, note, content selector
Frontend: Calendar has Google Calendar export links for scheduled posts
Frontend: Trend Finder page loads at /trends with niche input, platform buttons, search button
Frontend: UI has vibrant glow effects (glow-pink, glow-cyan, glow-gold, etc.)
Frontend: Ambient background has floating gradient animations
seed_data_creation: Test scheduled posts created and cleaned up during tests. Existing test post for 2026-04-15 was present in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 adds: 1) Calendar scheduling with CRUD endpoints (/api/calendar/schedule), 2) Push notifications via PWA with VAPID keys (/api/push/vapid-key), 3) Trend Finder agent (/trends page, /api/agents/trends), 4) New dashboard quick action buttons for trends/calendar/affiliates, 5) UI refresh with vibrant glow effects. POST /api/agents/find-trends calls AI and should not be tested in automated tests. Push notification testing limited to VAPID key availability - actual push requires browser permissions. No authentication required.
